description: MVP regression set for Why this matters writer/eval. All 18 cases locked 20 May 26 (synthetic inputs).

cases.title: Intro · monitoring intensity

input.subtitle: New cross-outlet pickup on a developing policy-to-political shift.

expected.referenceGolden: New on your watchlist — early pickup across outlets, so keep baseline monitoring, not background noise.

cases.title: Evolving · high framing divergence

cases.title: Duplication probe
